title: Replace assignments of lambdas to variables by function definitions
description: Assignments of lambda expressions to variables are less readable and harder to maintain than explicit function definitions.
message: A lambda expression is assigned to a variable.
recommendation: Replace lambda expression assignments with function definitions.

noncompliant.description: Lambda expression assigned to variable x.

compliant.description: Function definition replacing the lambda expression.

why_is_this_an_issue: Lambda expressions assigned to variables are less readable and harder to maintain.
how_to_fix: Replace lambda expression assignments with function definitions.

checks.message: A lambda expression is assigned to a variable.
